checks.name: State Independence
checks.notes: Skill is fully stateless. Context is preserved entirely through physical artifacts (CONTEXT_MAP.md, HYPOTHESIS_LIST.md, PATCH.md).

checks.name: Artifact Gating
checks.notes: Transitions explicitly demand artifact presence (e.g., 'condition: PATCH.md is written').

checks.name: Intent Preservation
checks.notes: Mandatory 'context' and 'tradeoffs_rejected' sections are enforced in artifacts to prevent lossy compression.

checks.name: Loop Breakers
checks.notes: YAML frontmatter includes 'max_retries: 3'. Explicit Wait-For-Human fallback exists.

checks.name: Physical Execution Standards
checks.notes: VALIDATOR relies on Exit Code 0, not vibe-checks, to approve patches.

checks.name: Single-File Format
checks.notes: Migrated successfully. YAML frontmatter combined with Markdown body in SKILL.md.

checks.name: Graceful Degradation
checks.notes: Uses specific tool requirements. Hitl fallback exists for failures.

checks.name: Separation of Concerns
checks.notes: YAML handles routing logic; Markdown handles cognitive instructions.

checks.name: Agent Agnosticism
checks.notes: No reliance on specific LLM features; strictly defined by tool requirements and filesystem state.
